# Generated Code: End-to-End Record Pipeline

This notebook builds a complete processing pipeline using generated utility modules.

from generated_tools.data_record_utils import (
    select_fields,
    rename_fields,
    filter_records,
    map_field,
    deduplicate_records,
    sort_records,
    aggregate_sum,
)
from generated_tools.data_validation_utils import (
    is_non_empty_string,
    is_valid_email,
    in_numeric_range,
    pick_validation_errors,
)
from generated_tools.data_stats_utils import mean, median, five_number_summary

print('Imports ready')

# Input records
records = [
    {"id": 1, "name": "Aria", "email": "aria@example.com", "team": "alpha", "score": 10},
    {"id": 2, "name": " Nora ", "email": "nora@example.com", "team": "beta", "score": 7},
    {"id": 3, "name": "", "email": "bad@", "team": "alpha", "score": 5},
    {"id": 3, "name": "", "email": "bad@", "team": "alpha", "score": 5},
    {"id": 4, "name": None, "email": "zed@example.com", "team": None, "score": "n/a"},
]

records

# Transform pipeline
step1 = select_fields(records, ["id", "name", "email", "team", "score"])
step2 = rename_fields(step1, {"name": "display_name"})
step3 = map_field(step2, "display_name", lambda v: v.strip().title() if isinstance(v, str) else v)
step4 = deduplicate_records(step3, ["id", "email", "team", "score"])
step5 = filter_records(
    step4,
    lambda r: (
        isinstance(r.get("score"), (int, float))
        and r["score"] >= 6
        and is_non_empty_string(r.get("display_name"))
        and is_valid_email(r.get("email", ""))
    ),
)
cleaned = sort_records(step5, key="score", descending=True)
cleaned

# Aggregation + stats
team_totals = aggregate_sum(cleaned, group_key="team", value_key="score")
scores = [r["score"] for r in cleaned]

summary = {
    "rows_in": len(records),
    "rows_cleaned": len(cleaned),
    "team_totals": team_totals,
    "score_mean": mean(scores) if scores else None,
    "score_median": median(scores) if scores else None,
    "score_five_number": five_number_summary(scores) if scores else None,
}
summary

# Final payload for downstream API/CLI use
payload = {
    "cleaned_records": cleaned,
    "validation_results": validation_results,
    "summary": summary,
}
payload
